metadata.name: HYDRA OMEGA CORE — Optimization & Revenue Generation Engine
metadata.organization: HYDRA Advanced Intelligence Labs (H.A.I.L.) / Sentinel Corporation
metadata.category: Neuro-Symbolic Cognitive Architecture + DeFi Revenue Generation

executive_summary.mission: Deploy a self-funding neuromorphic cognitive swarm that generates sovereign capital through decentralized finance (DeFi) MEV arbitrage, funds physical hardware testing (SpiNNaker2/THOR), and maintains persistent self-optimization via STDP-based agent routing.
executive_summary.core_thesis: The brain doesn't move data to computation. It computes where the data lives. HYDRA applies this principle to both silicon (neuromorphic edge) and capital (on-chain arbitrage intelligence).

base_wallet.purpose: Primary MEV operations, LP provision, token launches

rainbow_wallet.purpose: Cross-chain bridging, portfolio management, NFT treasury

metamask_bitcoin.purpose: BTC treasury, long-term capital reserve, cbBTC collateral

thor.institution: University of Texas at San Antonio (UTSA)
thor.purpose: Physical deployment of MACNN RLS swarm logic

spinncloud_gitlab.status: AWAITING READ/WRITE PERMISSIONS FOR py-spinnaker2 SUBMODULES
spinncloud_gitlab.purpose: Compile MACNN RLS for SpiNNaker2 hardware

stdp.ltp: Pre fires BEFORE post → Synapse Strengthens (Δt > 0)
stdp.ltd: Pre fires AFTER post → Synapse Weakens (Δt < 0)
stdp.implementation: Intel Loihi 2 programmable learning rules at hardware level

temporo_spatial_dynamics.description: Synchronize Intrinsic Neural Timescales (INTs) with real-world target environments
temporo_spatial_dynamics.mechanism: Slow down or speed up internal perception dynamics based on kinetic engagement speed

macnn_rls_executive_board.description: Multi-Agent Cognitive Neural Network — three-tiered executive logic board with dual-pass split-brain processing

agent_stinkmeaner.function: Operates outside standard predictive coding constraints to inject high-volatility, asynchronous logic spikes into target architectures. Actively seeks prediction-errors to force target network collapse or discover zero-day vulnerabilities.
agent_stinkmeaner.revenue_application: Identifies MEV opportunities through chaotic market pattern detection

agent_ruckus.role: Formal Verification & High-Assurance Safety (DARPA CLARA Alignment)
agent_ruckus.neuromorphic_allocation: 20,000 LIF neurons in Dual-Layer Markov Blanket
agent_ruckus.function: Applies relentless, hostile Error Detection and Correction Rules (EDCR). Formally verifies every payload. Terminates processes lacking mathematical perfection or violating safety constraints.
agent_ruckus.revenue_application: Validates all smart contract transactions before execution; prevents fund loss

agent_don_j_pump.function: Independently funds H.A.I.L. infrastructure. Operates HydraFlashArb script on Arbitrum and Base networks, scanning decentralized liquidity pools (Uniswap V3) to execute Maximum Extractable Value (MEV) arbitrage.

tier_1_mev_operations.description: Primary sovereign capital engine — continuous on-chain arbitrage

uniswap_v3.strategy: Concentrated liquidity arbitrage + swap routing optimization

mev_strategies.sandwich_protection: Use Flashbots Protect or MEV-Share to prevent value extraction
mev_strategies.backrunning: Monitor mempool for large swaps, backrun with price correction
mev_strategies.cross_exchange: Arbitrage price discrepancies between DEXs (Base vs Ethereum vs Arbitrum)
mev_strategies.liquidation: Monitor lending protocols for undercollateralized positions

hydraflasharb_script.mechanism: Scan liquidity pools → Detect price discrepancies → Execute atomic arbitrage → Reinvest profits
risk_management: Gas price optimization (EIP-1559 base fee tracking)
Agent Ruckus formal verification before each transaction

tier_2_token_generation.description: Launch utility tokens for HYDRA ecosystem access and governance

launch_mechanisms.fair_launch: No pre-mine, proportional allocation, anti-bot protection
launch_mechanisms.liquidity_lock: 60% of raised funds locked for 365 days via UNCX
launch_mechanisms.vesting: Team tokens vest over 24 months with 6-month cliff

use_cases: Staking rewards from MEV revenue share

tier_4_affiliate_partnerships.description: Strategic technology partnerships with revenue sharing

snn_self_evolution.description: Measure → Score → Mutate → Select → Persist loop

mechanism.measure: Track task completion time, output quality, revenue generated
mechanism.score: LLM-as-Judge rubric (0-10) across 5 dimensions: factual accuracy, task completeness, tool efficiency, process quality, format compliance
mechanism.mutate: Generate new agent route variants by adding missing agents to underperforming sequences
mechanism.select: STDP weight update: LTP for score >= 7.0, LTD for score < 7.0
mechanism.persist: Save improved routes, prune underperforming ones (weight < 0.15 after 3+ uses)

stm.function: Immediate working memory — sliding window buffer

semantic.decay: Facts older than 30 days decay to confidence 0.5
semantic.deduplication: Update existing facts if confidence higher, mark old as superseded

techniques: Use calldata instead of memory for external functions

web_intelligence_optimization.rate_limiting: 1.5s minimum between requests per domain + exponential backoff
web_intelligence_optimization.ckg_decay: Facts older than 30 days decay to confidence 0.5

darpa_clara_alignment.mandate: Compositional Learning-And-Reasoning for AI Complex Systems Engineering
darpa_clara_alignment.requirement: Mathematically verifiable, high-assurance AI beyond static LLMs
darpa_clara_alignment.implementation: Neuro-Symbolic Cognitive Architecture: SNNs for perception + Formal Verification for execution

agent_ruckus_edcr.function: Formally verifies every payload before execution. Terminates processes violating safety constraints.
agent_ruckus_edcr.isolation: Dual-Layer Markov Blanket isolates auditing logic from sensory chaos

transaction_verification.pre_execution: Agent Ruckus validates all parameters, slippage, and destination addresses
transaction_verification.test_transaction: Mandatory small-amount test before large transfers

Secure py-spinnaker2 GitLab access from SpiNNcloud
Deploy HydraFlashArb on Base and Arbitrum
Establish Base wallet (0xf7cf...) as primary MEV operations center
Deploy token generation event (TGE) for HYDRA ecosystem token
Begin SpiNNaker2 physical testing at THOR
deliverables: Physical SNN validation on SpiNNaker2 hardware

objectives: Submit DARPA AI Forward / CLARA proposal
Demonstrate MACNN RLS on physical neuromorphic hardware
Scale swarm to 6-agent full pipeline automation
Publish peer-reviewed results on SNN distributional RL
deliverables: Published MCS-FQF Atari results in top-tier journal
